# Connections — portal submission

**Title:** Groups

**Tagline:** Find the 4 hidden groups of 4. One puzzle a day, 4 mistakes allowed.

**Controls:** Tap 4 words to select, then tap Submit. Shuffle and Deselect available.

**Tags:** word, puzzle, daily, logic, casual, mobile, highscore

**Description:**
A daily category puzzle — 16 words secretly belong to 4 hidden groups, and you have to figure out which. Tap four words you think share a theme and submit; get it right and they lock in with their category revealed, get it wrong and you lose one of four lives. Shareable result grid, daily streak, and unlimited Practice mode.

## Where to upload
- itch.io  (Kind: HTML, check 'mobile friendly', set viewport ~520x720, upload connections.zip)
- CrazyGames developer portal (HTML5; add their SDK for rev-share before submitting)
- GameDistribution / Playgama Bridge (one build to many portals)

> Reminder: integrate a portal SDK's rewarded-video before monetized submission; itch.io accepts the plain zip as-is for the first real-world signal.
